aionima.name: Plaid
aionima.description: System-level Plaid integration. Registers 4 agent tools (list-accounts / fetch-transactions / get-balance / identity-verify) globally to Aion's tool palette so Aion can read bank accounts directly; MApps (Accounting / Budget Tracker / Expenses) are secondary consumers via mini-agent auto-discovery. Plaid Link OAuth flow lives in Local-ID (mirrors GitHub provider pattern); PLAID_CLIENT_ID + PLAID_SECRET resolved from agi Vault at runtime. No plugin-side credential collection.
